metadata.title: Amnii
metadata.description: The most reliable platform for real estate in Rwanda.

hero.title: Discover your next home in Rwanda
hero.subtitle: Search apartments, houses, and rooms across Kigali and all 30 districts. Contact owners directly — always free.

home.urgentDesc: Properties that need tenants soon — contact owners directly today
home.safetyDesc: Never pay before visiting a property. Always verify the owner in person. Look for verified badges and report suspicious listings.
home.safetyWarning: Amnii will never ask you to pay a fee to unlock contact details. If someone asks, report them immediately.
home.featuresDesc: Built for Rwanda's housing market — transparent, local, and always free to browse

features.verifiedDesc: Every property is reviewed for accuracy. Look for verified badges before you visit or pay.
features.contactDesc: Phone and WhatsApp are always visible. Contact owners and agents directly — no hidden fees.
features.localDesc: Search by province, district, and sector across all 30 districts of Rwanda.

listing.contactFree: Free to contact — no unlock fees
listing.safetyText: Never send money before visiting in person. Verify the property and owner before any payment.

search.title: Find Properties in Rwanda
search.found: {count} listings found · Contact details always visible
search.foundOne: 1 listing found · Contact details always visible
search.noResultsHint: Try removing filters or searching a different district.

login.subtitle: Sign in to save listings, manage your properties, and list on Amnii.
login.verifyEmail: Account created. Check your email to verify, then sign in.
login.trustNote: Your account keeps your listings secure. Contact details on properties are always visible to seekers.

about.label: About us
about.heroTitle: Rwanda's trusted address for real estate
about.heroDesc: We connect seekers, owners, and agents with clarity — no hidden contacts, no noise.
about.valuesDesc: Simple principles that keep the marketplace honest.
about.trustDesc: Verification, reporting, and transparent contact build confidence on both sides.
about.directDesc: Seekers reach owners or agents immediately. We never hide phone numbers behind a paywall.
about.rwandaDesc: Districts, sectors, commissioners, and local search patterns — designed for how Kigali actually works.
about.step1Desc: Browse verified listings across Kigali and all 30 districts. Filter by price, area, and type.
about.step2Desc: Contact the owner or agent directly by phone or WhatsApp. No middleman fees.
about.step3Desc: Inspect the property in person. Never pay before you have seen it and met the lister.
about.rolesTitle: Built for everyone in the market
about.seekersDesc: Find homes across Rwanda. Save favourites, contact directly, stay safe.
about.ownersDesc: List for free. Manage your properties and reach serious tenants and buyers.
about.agentsDesc: Build your profile, manage client listings, earn verified status.
about.safetyIntro: Your security matters. Follow these rules every time you search for housing.
about.safetyTip1Desc: Never send money before physically visiting the property and meeting the owner or agent.
about.safetyTip2Desc: Look for verified badges and confirm property details match what you see in person.
about.safetyTip3Desc: Contact landlords through the phone or WhatsApp numbers shown on the listing.
about.safetyTip4Desc: Report scams, duplicates, or wrong information to help keep the marketplace safe.

faq.a1: Yes. Browsing listings and contacting owners or agents is completely free. We do not charge unlock fees or hide phone numbers.
faq.q2: How do I list my property?
faq.a2: Create an account, then use List Property. Choose owner-direct or agent-managed, add photos and details, and publish.
faq.q3: What is Owner Direct vs Agent Managed?
faq.a3: Owner Direct means you manage the listing and seekers contact you. Agent Managed means a verified Amnii agent handles inquiries on your behalf.
faq.a4: Verified listings and agents have passed our review process. Look for the gold verified badge.
faq.q5: How do I stay safe from scams?
faq.a5: Never send money before visiting in person. Verify the lister, use contact details shown on Amnii only, and report suspicious listings.
faq.q6: Can owners and agents both list?
faq.a6: Yes. Many owners list directly. Others work with a commissioner or agent — Amnii supports both paths.
faq.a7: Agents maintain a public profile, manage listings, earn verified status, and build ratings from response time and quality.
faq.a8: Use the report option on any listing or contact us via the About page. Multiple reports trigger an automatic review.

footer.tagline: Made for Rwanda · Free to browse · Contact always visible

portal.chooseDesc: Select the portal that matches your role. Sign in to sync your data across devices.
portal.seekerDesc: Save favourites, get alerts, and track your home search.
portal.ownerDesc: Post listings, view analytics, and manage inquiries.
portal.agentDesc: Manage multiple listings and grow your reputation.

admin.title: Moderation centre
admin.subtitle: Review listings, handle reports, and suspend fraudulent accounts.
admin.accessDesc: Use the same login page as everyone else. Your admin account is created in the database — not through the public sign-up form.
admin.seedStep: Run npm run db:seed:admin locally once (uses your service role key).
admin.signInStep: Sign in at /login with the seeded email and password from .env.local.
admin.redirectStep: After sign-in, admins are redirected here automatically.
